Frequently Asked Questions
1. BSEB Bihar DELED Admission Online Form Start Date?
The online application process started on 11 December 2025.
2. BSEB Bihar DELED Admission Exam Date?
The Examination will be conducted in 08 June 2026 .
3. Where can I find the syllabus for the BSEB Bihar DELED Examination?
The detailed syllabus and examination scheme for BSEB Bihar DELED Examination are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete syllabus details.
4. BSEB Bihar DELED Admission Notification PDF?
Candidates can download the notification through SarkariResult.com.
5. BSEB Bihar DELED Admission Last Date?
The last date to apply online is 24 December 2025.
6. What is the last date to Update application fee Details?
Candidates can pay the application fee up to 24 December 2025 .
7. How can I apply for BSEB Bihar DELED Admission Exam?
BSEB Bihar DELED Admission
tables: Bihar School Examination Board (BSEB)  has released the DELED Joint Entrance Test 2026-2028 online application for admission 2026-2028 will start from 11 December 2025 and the last date to apply will be 24 December 2025. Various College are participating in Bihar DELED 2025, candidates should read the information brochure for all the information related to the entrance exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, placement, fees, college information and other types of information and then apply.
Bihar School Examination Board Bihar Diploma in Elementary Education Bihar DELED Exam 2026 : Short Details of Notification Sarkari Result® WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM Since 2012
Important Dates Application Begin : 11/12/2025 Last Date for Apply : 24/12/2025 Fee Payment Last Date : 24/12/2025 Exam Date : 08/06/2026 Admit Card Available : 28/05/2026
Application Fees General / BC / EWS : 960 /- SC / ST / PH : 760 /- Pay the Examination Fee Through Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking / Online Only.
BSEB DELED Notification 2026 : Age Limit Details Minimum Age : 17 Years. Age Relaxation as per BSEB DELED Admission 2026-2028 Vigyapati.
10+2 Intermediate Passed with 50%  Minimum Marks in Any Recognized Board. More Details Read the Notification.

How to Fill BSEB DELED Admission Online Form 2026 Bihar School Examination Board Released the DELED Diploma in Elementary Education (Session 2026-2028) Online Form 2025 Notification. Candidate Can Apply Between 11 December 2025 to 24 December 2025. Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Admission Application Form in BSEB DELED Online 2026. Kindly Check and College the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Admission Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
